docTitle: Bhaibheri muKupeta Kumwe · Kubva paKusika kusvika kuKereke

share.title: Bhaibheri muKupeta Kumwe
share.text: Mukupeta kumwe chete, ziva nyaya huru yeBhaibheri — uye chikonzero nei Jesu akauya.

s.ui.footer: Bhaibheri muKupeta Kumwe · Mashoko eBhaibheri anobva muBhaibheri 1949/2002
s.hero.title:
Bhaibheri,
mukupeta kumwe
s.hero.sub: Mukupeta kumwe chete, ziva nyaya huru yeBhaibheri — uye chikonzero nei Jesu akauya.
s.thread.note: Mwari anovimbisa (sungano), vanhu vanomirira nguva refu, uye pakupedzisira zvose zvinozadziswa uye zvinopera muna Jesu. Tevera zviitiko gumi nezvitatu zviri pasi apa nenzira iyi — tinya “Verenga zvimwe” pakadhi rimwe nerimwe kuti unyatsoziva nyaya yacho.
s.gospel.sublead: Inyaya yokuti Mwari, nenyasha chete, akanunura vatadzi vakanga vasingagoni kuzviponesa pachavo. Pakati pacho pamire Jesu Kristu.
s.gospel.mirror:
Denderedzwa risingaperi raIsiraeri richokwadi mufananidzo wa“ini”

Kunamata zvifananidzo→Kutambudzika→Kuchema→Mwari anonunura→Kunamata zvifananidzo zvakare…

Kubva pavaTongi kusvika kuutapwa, Isiraeri inodzokorora denderedzwa iri zvisingaperi. Bhaibheri harina kurinyora kuti tisveere tichiti, “Vakanga vakaderera sei.”

Ikani chionioni. Pfungwa haisi yokuti “Isiraeri vakaita izvozvo” asi “neniwo ndinoita saizvozvo” (1 VaKorinte 10:11).

Chifananidzo hachisi mufananidzo wakavezwa chete. Ndichinhu chipi nechipi chatinoda kana kuvimba nacho kupfuura Mwari — mari, kubudirira, kutenderwa, vanhu, kunyange ini pachangu. Uye kushandisa Mwari semudziyo wokuwana zvandinoda kunamata zvifananidzowo.

Pakupedzisira, chifananidzo chakadzika kupfuura zvose ndi“ini pachangu, ndakagara pachigaro choushe chaMwari.”
s.gospel.coreIntro: Saka Mwari anoponesa sei mutadzi akadai? Heuno mwoyo wevhangeri rinoparidzwa neBhaibheri.
s.gospel.crux:
Bhaibheri rose rinonongedzera kunzvimbo imwe chete.

Vanhu vakanga vasingagoni kutyora denderedzwa rechivi pachavo, uye kwakanga kusina munhu akarurama. Saka mumwe munhu aifanira kuripa mutengo munzvimbo yedu.

Jesu haana kungouya kuzopa dzidziso dzakanaka chete. Pakushaya imwe nzira yokundiponesa nayo, akanga asina imwe nzira kunze kwokuuya.

Munhu aifanira kunge akarembera pamuchinjikwa uya ndini ini.
Jesu akatakura chivi changu akarovererwa ipapo munzvimbo yangu.

“Asi akakuvadzwa nokuda kwokudarika kwedu, akarwadziwa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvedu… takaporeswa namavanga ake.” — Isaya 53:5
s.faq.q1: ▸ Saka mhondi inongotenda chete ichienda kudenga, asi munhu akararama upenyu hwakanaka asingatendi achienda kugehena?
s.faq.a1:
Mubvunzo wakanaka. Asi mukati maro mune kunzwisisa kusakarurama kuviri.

① Bhaibheri haparadzanisi vanhu kuti “vakanaka” na“vakaipa.” Chiyero hachisi “kupfuura wokwako” asi “utsvene hwakakwana hwaMwari.” Pamberi pake, hakuna munhu “akanaka zvakakwana” (VaRoma 3:23). Saka uku hakusi “munhu akanaka achipesana nemhondi,” asi kunyanya zvakafanana navanhu vaviri vane chirwere chimwe chinouraya — mumwe anotambira mushonga, mumwe anouramba achiti, “Ndakagwinya kupfuura uya.”

② Chinhu chimwe chete ndicho chinoparadzanisa denga negehena. Hachisi chiyero chamabasa, asi kuti wakagamuchira Jesu Kristu saIshe here uye dambudziko rako rechivi rakagadziriswa here. Uyo ane chivi chakagadziriswa neropa raKristu anoenda kudenga; uyo asingambomugamuchiri, ane chivi chakasara, haaendi. Hapana basa rakanaka rakawanda ringagadzirisa dambudziko rechivi pacharo.

Saka denga negehena hazvisi “mubayiro wokuita zvakanaka” asi inyaya yeukama naKristu. Uye “kutenda” hakusi kubvumirana mupfungwa chete, asi kuchinja kuti ndiani anotonga upenyu hwako — ani naani anonyatsomugamuchira haazvikudzi asi anotendeuka zvakadzika kupfuura. Chokwadi, kuzviti wakarurama (“ndiri munhu akanaka”) ndicho chifananidzo chakaoma kutyora kupfuura zvose, icho chinoita kuti tifunge kuti hatidi Kristu (Ruka 18:9-14).

Bhaibheri rinozvitaura pachena: “Anotenda kwaari, haatongwi; asi asingatendi kwaari, atotongwa” (Johani 3:18). Kutongwa hakusi “kuyera upenyu hwako paunofa,” asi kwatova kwakatemwa nekuti wakagamuchira Kristu here.

VaRoma 3:23 · Johani 3:18 · VaEfeso 2:8-9 · Ruka 18:9-14
s.faq.q2: ▸ Ko handingangoraramawo upenyu hwakanaka ndisingatendi muna Jesu here?
s.faq.a2:
Ndiyo pfungwa inonyanya kuvapo, asi inotadza kunzwisisa kuti dambudziko chairo nderei. Heino mufananidzo.

Funga kuti uri muchikepe chamakororo egungwa. Kunyange ukachenesa sei pasi pechikepe, ukava nomwoyo munyoro kuvashandi, ukararama upenyu hunoremekedzwa — uchiri gororo regungwa, nokuti chikepe chinokutakura pamwe nacho kunzvimbo yachakananga (chiteshi chokutongwa). Dambudziko harisi “chiyero chamabasa ako” asi “ndecheri chikepe chaurimo” (ndiani iwe).

Saka vhangeri hariti “edza zvakanyanya kuva akanaka”; rinoti “chinja chikepe.” Buruka muchikepe chechivi uende kuna Jesu — uende kune wava mwana waMwari, ndiani matsva. Uku hakusi kuwedzera chiyero chako nesimba rako, asi kuvimba neuyo anotambanudza ruoko rwake ndokuyambukira kuchikepe chake.

Chokwadi Bhaibheri rinotsanangura ruponeso saizvozvo zvachose — “vakatisunungura pasimba rerima, vakatiisa muushe hwoMwanakomana worudo rwavo” (VaKorose 1:13).

Usanzwisisa zvisizvo: izvi hazvirevi kuti upenyu hwakanaka hahuna maturo. Kunaka hakusi “mubvunzo” weruponeso asi chibereko charo. Uyo akachinja chikepe iye zvino anorarama zvakanaka kwete nokutya, asi nokuda kworudo rwomwana.

VaKorose 1:13 · Johani 1:12 · Johani 3:3 · VaEfeso 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ Kana muiti wezvakaipa achinzwa rugare, achiti “Mwari akandikanganwira,” asi munhu akakuvadzwa achiri kutambudzika — ko nyasha hadzina kuva dzakachipa zvakanyanya here?
s.faq.a3:
Mubvunzo wakanaka, uye kurwadziwa kwacho ndekwechokwadi. Asi kutaura kwakadaro hakusi “kukanganwira kweBhaibheri” — kunyangadza kwako.

① Kukanganwira kwaMwari hakumbofa kwakachipa. Chivi hachivanzwi sokuti hachina kumboitika; Mwari pachake akaripa mutengo wacho noupenyu hwoMwanakomana wake. Muchinjikwa hausi uchapupu hwokuti chivi chinotorwa zvisina basa, asi hwokuti chivi chinorema sei — kukanganwira kunodhura kupfuura zvose panyika.

② Kutendeuka kwechokwadi kunobereka zvibereko. Kana muiti wezvakaipa achizvikudza pamberi pomunhu akakuvadzwa — “Mwari akandikanganwira, saka ndine rugare” — uku hakusi kutendeuka asi kutevedzera kwako (Mateo 3:8). Uye kukanganwira pakati pomunhu naMwari hakubvisi ronda romunhu akakuvadzwa kana kumumanikidza kukanganwira.

③ Chivi hachimbongoregererwa “zvakangodaro.” Chivi chimwe nechimwe chinoripwa kune imwe yenzvimbo mbiri — kana Kristu achitakura pamuchinjikwa (kuna vanovimba naye hakuchina kupiwa mhosva, VaRoma 8:1), kana kuti uyo anomuramba kusvika pakuguma anozvitakura iye amene. Saka hapana “kukanganwira kwakachipa.” Muiti wezvakaipa achine mhosva pamberi pomutemo wenyika ino (VaRoma 13:1-4).

④ Misodzi yomunhu akakuvadzwa haina kumbova miduku kuna Mwari. Mwari anochema navanochema, anorangarira musodzi mumwe nomumwe, uye pakupedzisira achaipisika iye pachake (Zvakazarurwa 21:4). Saka munhu akakuvadzwa haatakuri mutoro wokutsiva ari oga, asi anogona kuupa kuna Mwari akarurama (VaRoma 12:19 — “Kutsiva ndokwangu, ini ndicharipira ndizvo zvinoreva Ishe”).

Mateo 3:8 · VaRoma 8:1 · VaRoma 13:1-4 · Zvakazarurwa 21:4
s.faq.q4: ▸ Bhaibheri inyaya yechokwadi here? Rinonzwika sengano yekare kana sengano isina kuitika.
s.faq.a4:
Mubvunzo wakanaka — uye nzvimbo yakanaka yekutangira. Kukahadzika hakusi kupesana nokutenda, asi chishuvo chokunyatsoongorora zvinhu. Bhaibheri harisi ngano isinganzwisisiki yokuti «tenda kana uchida», asi chinyorwa chakanyorwa pamusoro penzvimbo, mazuva, uye vanhu chaivo. Mienzaniso mishoma chete.

① Harisi bhuku rimwe asi «raibhurari» — asi rinoyerera pamusoro pedingindira rimwe. Bhaibheri iunganidzwa hwemabhuku makumi matanhatu nematanhatu akanyorwa kweanenge makore chiuru namazana mashanu nevanyori vanenge makumi mana — madzimambo, vafudzi, varedzi vehove, muteresi, chiremba, vanhu vezvinzvimbo nenguva dzakasiyana, vachinyora vakaparadzana vasingazivani, nemitauro mitatu (chiHebheru, chiAramaiki, chiGiriki). Asi zvose zvinosangana, pasina nyongano, padingindira rimwe: ruponeso kubudikidza naKristu. Iko kuwirirana kunoomesa kutsanangura nemhaka yetsaona kana kurongeka kwevanhu.

② Rinoramba richisimbiswa kubva pasi (zvenhembo dzekare). Zvinhu zvizhinji zvaimbozojairwa sezvakanyepwa, «zvaiwanikwa muBhaibheri chete», zvakazosimbiswa nekuchera. Imba yamadzimambo yaDhavhidhi nedombo rakanyorwa «imba yaDhavhidhi» (Tel Dan Stele); Pondiyo Pirato, mubati akauraya Jesu, nechinyorwa chine zita rake; bako remvura raMambo Hezekia (2 Madzimambo 20:20) nebako chairo nechinyorwa charo. Kunyange vaHiti, vaimbonzi «vanhu vekufungidzira», vakabuda seumambo hukuru mumatongo.

③ Ndicho chinyorwa chekare chakachengetedzwa zvakanyanya (zvinyorwa zvemaoko). Pakuwanda kwezvinyorwa zvemaoko zvakasara, kubvumirana kwazvo, nenguva iri pakati pekunyora nekukopa, Bhaibheri harina rakaenzana naro pakati pezvinyorwa zvekare. Gwaro raIsaya rekare Kristu asati azvarwa pakati peGwaro reGungwa Rakafa (rakawanikwa muna 1947) rakawirirana nezvinyorwa zvenguva yakatevera anenge makore chiuru chaiwo zvinenge nyora nenyora — uchapupu hwokuti Bhaibheri rakachengetedzwa zvakarurama kwemazera ose.

④ Zvinhu zvakanyorwa pachine nguva zvakaitika sezvazvakanga zvakanyorwa (uporofita). Testamende Yekare, yakanyorwa mazana emakore Jesu asati auya, inonongedzera zvakajeka kuzvarwa kwake muBhetirehema, muranda anotambudzika (Isaya 53:5), uye mamiriro ezvinhu emuchinjikwa (Pisarema 22). Zvakanyatsorongeka kwazvo kuti zvingoraswa setsaona.

⑤ Vanyori venhau vekunze kweBhaibheri vakazvinyorawo. Munyori weRoma Tacitus nemunyori wechiJudha Josephus — vasiri vaKristu — vanotaura nezvaJesu, kuurayiwa kwake, nekereke yekutanga. Kupfuura zvose, vadzidzi vakanga vapararira nekutya vakaisa upenyu hwavo panjodzi vachipupura nezvekumuka — hapana munhu anofira chaanoziva kuti inhema.

Kutaura chokwadi, izvi zvikuru zvinoratidza kuti kutenda Bhaibheri hakusi kusafunga asi kunonzwisisika; hahusi «uchapupu» hunomanikidza sefomura yemasvomhu. Saka chivimbo chemuKristu hachibvi pauchapupu chete, asi pakuvimba kunopiwa mwoyo neMweya Mutsvene paanoverenga Shoko. Bhaibheri rinoti — «Naizvozvo kutenda kunouya nokunzwa, nokunzwa kunouya neshoko raKristu.» (VaRoma 10:17). Saka kunyange kunzwika sengano sei, kuriverenga wega ndiko kutanga. Uchapupu hunozarura musuo, uye chivimbo chinokura mukati memunhu anoverenga.

2 Madzimambo 20:20 · Isaya 53:5 · VaRoma 10:17
s.respond.sub: Rudo urwu harusi ruzivo asi kukoka. Kana rudo rwakarovererwa munzvimbo yako rwabata mwoyo wako, nyengetera munyengetero uyu zvishoma nezvishoma, mutsara nomutsara.
s.respond.prayer:
Mwari,

ndinobvuma kuti ndiri mutadzi asingagoni kuzviponesa.

Ndinotenda kuti Jesu akandifira pamuchinjikwa uye akamukazve.

Ndapota kanganwirai zvivi zvangu zvose, uye kubva nhasi ivai Ishe woupenyu hwangu.

Ndigamuchirei somwana wenyu, uye ndiponesei kuti ndirarame upenyu hutsva.

Muzita raJesu ndinonyengetera. Ameni.
s.respond.after: Kana wanyengetera uku nomwoyo wose, Bhaibheri rinoti wava mwana waMwari. Hauchisiri wega — tsvaka kereke iri pedyo ufambe naro mu rwendo rwokutenda pamwe chete.
s.respond.verse: “Asi vose vakamugamuchira, akavapa simba kuti vave vana vaMwari.” — Johani 1:12 · VaRoma 10:9-10
s.closing.verse: “Kunyange rufu, kana upenyu… kana chinhu chimwe chakasikwa, hazvingagoni kutiparadzanisa norudo rwaMwari, ruri muna Kristu Jesu, Ishe wedu.” — VaRoma 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
Pamusoro penyaya iyi, Murayiro, mabhuku enhetembo, vaporofita, netsamba zvinowedzera “nyama.”
Kubva zvino, bhuku ripi neripi raunovhura, uchaziva kwauri panyaya yacho.
s.about.line: Zvichienderana nemaonero enhoroondo yoruponeso, evhangeri uye eReformed anogoveranwa nevazhinji vekereke yechiProtestant yeKorea.

epochs.title: Kusika
epochs.events: Mazuva matanhatu okusika, vanhu vakaitwa nomufananidzo waMwari, zororo reSabata
epochs.christ: Nyika yakaitwa kuburikidza ne“Izwi.” Vhangeri raJohani rinoti Izwi iri ndiJesu pachake (Johani 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
Bhaibheri haritangi nenharo dzouzivi asi nokuzivisa: “Pakutanga Mwari…” Nyika haisi tsaona asi basa raMwari ari munhu.

  • Mufananidzo waMwari · pazvisikwa zvose, vanhu chete ndivo vakaitwa kuti vafanane naMwari — kuti vamuzive uye vachengete nyika.
  • Zororo · zororo rezuva rechinomwe rinoratidza zvose zvakakwana uye zvine rugare (shalom): “zvakanga zvakanaka.”
  • Edheni · nyika isati yatyorwa, kwaifamba Mwari navanhu pamwe chete.
epochs.next: Asi kuzara uku kwava kuda kuputswa…

epochs.title: Kuwa
epochs.one: Chivi chakapinda, ukama pakati pavanhu naMwari ndokugurwa.
epochs.events: Kudya muchero wakarambidzwa, kudzingwa muEdheni, kusvika kworufu nokutambudzika
epochs.q: Ndichaisa ruvengo pakati pako nomukadzi… irwo rwuchapwanya musoro wako.
epochs.christ: Chivimbiso chokutanga chevhangeri, chakapiwa pakarepo kuwa kwapfuura: “rudzi rwomukadzi” ruchapwanya musoro wenyoka — uye ndiJesu (Genesi 3:15; VaRoma 16:20; VaGaratiya 4:4).
epochs.detail:
Kuburikidza nokusateerera kwokuda “kuva saMwari,” chivi chakapinda munyika. Mugumisiro hausi kungotyora mutemo chete asi kutyorwa kweukama.

  • Ukama hwakatyorwa · naMwari (kuvanda), navamwe (kupomerana), nezvakasikwa (minzwa nokutambudzika).
  • Rufu · yambiro yokuti “uchafa zvirokwazvo” inova chokwadi.
  • Genesi 3:15 · asi pakati pokutongwa, chivimbiso chokununura chinotanga kupiwa. Vadzidzi vanochiti “protoevangelium” (vhangeri rokutanga).
epochs.next: Zvino Mwari anodana murume mumwe kuti atange kununura…

epochs.title: Madzitateguru
epochs.one: Mwari anovimbisa Abhurahamu, “Uchava nzira yokuropafadza nayo.”
epochs.events: Sungano yaAbhurahamu, kusungwa kwaIsaka, vanakomana gumi navaviri vaJakobho, Josefa anokwirira kuva mubati muIjipiti
epochs.q: Ndichakuita rudzi rukuru… marudzi ose enyika acharopafadzwa mauri.
epochs.christ: Chivimbiso chokuti “marudzi ose acharopafadzwa” chinozadziswa muna Jesu, rudzi rwaAbhurahamu (VaGaratiya 3:16).
epochs.detail:
Mwari anotanga kugadzirisa dambudziko ravanhu vose nokudana murume mumwe, Abhurahamu. Pakati pacho ndisungano (chivimbiso) — rudzi rukuru, nyika, uye “kuropafadzwa kwamarudzi ose.”

  • Kutenda · Abhurahamu akatenda chivimbiso chisingaonekwi, akanzi ndiko kururama kwake (Genesi 15:6).
  • Isaka naJakobho · chivimbiso chinopfuurira; Jakobho (Isiraeri) ndiye baba vamarudzi gumi namaviri.
  • Josefa · akatengeswa nehama dzake asi akakwidziridzwa kuva mubati — “Mwari akafunga kuti zvive zvakanaka” (Genesi 50:20).
epochs.next: Vachitevera Josefa, mhuri inoburukira kuIjipiti — ndokuva varanda…

epochs.title: Kubuda kweIjipiti neRenje
epochs.one: Mwari akanunura vanhu vaiva varanda akavaita vake.
epochs.events: Matambudziko gumi, Pasika, kuyambuka Gungwa Dzvuku, Mirairo Gumi paSinai, tabhenakeri, makore makumi mana murenje
epochs.q: Ndichakutorai imi kuti muve vanhu vangu, ini ndichava Mwari wenyu.
epochs.christ: Pasika — pakanunura ropa regwayana parufu — inonongedzera kuna Jesu, “gwayana redu rePasika,” akarovererwa nokuda kwedu (1 VaKorinte 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Ruponeso rukuru pane zvose zveTestamende Yekare. Isiraeri yaimbova varanda inosunungurwa nesimba raMwari ndokuumbwa kuva vanhu vake.

  • Pasika · imba yakaratidzwa neropa regwayana inopfuurwa norufu — muenzaniso wezvibayiro zvose zvakatevera.
  • Gungwa Dzvuku · ruponeso panopera nzira; “kuyambuka” kunova chiratidzo chokutanga kutsva.
  • Sungano yeSinai · kuburikidza neMirairo vanodzidza kurarama savanhu vaMwari.
  • Tabhenakeri · nzvimbo tsvene inotamiswa kwainogara Mwari pakati pavanhu vake — chiratidzo cha“Emanueri.”
  • Makore makumi mana · kusateerera kunoita kuti chizvarwa chidzungaire, asi Mwari anogara pedyo nemana neshongwe yegore nemoto.
epochs.next: Vamire pamuganhu wenyika yakavimbiswa, vanogadzirira kupinda…

epochs.title: Kukunda neVatongi
epochs.one: Vakawana nyika, asi pasina mambo munhu wose aiita zvaaida.
epochs.people: Joshua; vatongi vakaita saGidhiyoni naSamusoni; Rute
epochs.events: Kuwa kweJeriko, kugara muKenani, denderedzwa rinodzokororwa rechivi–kutongwa–kununurwa
epochs.q: Namazuva iwayo kwakanga kusina mambo pakati paIsiraeri; murume mumwe nomumwe waiita sezvaakafunga kuti ndizvo zvakanaka.
epochs.christ: Kubva kurudzi rwaRute kunobva Dhavhidhi, uye kubva kurudzi rwaDhavhidhi kunobva Jesu (Mateo 1). Kunyange mubvongodzeki, mutsara womhuri yaMesiya unopfuurira.
epochs.detail:
Pasi paJoshua vanopinda munyika yakavimbiswa, asi vagara vanokurumidza kukanganwa Mwari. Vatongi inhau imwe cheteyo inodzokororwa.

  • Denderedzwa rinoenda pasi · chivi → kudzvinyirirwa → kuchema → mutongi anonunura → chivi zvakare. Zvinongoramba zvichiipa.
  • Vatongi · Gidhiyoni, Samusoni, Dhebhora — vanunuri vechinguva, vamhare asi vane zvikanganiso zvakawanda.
  • Rute · nyaya yakajeka yokutendeka munguva yerima; mukadzi wokumwe nyika anopinda murudzi rwaDhavhidhi (naJesu).

epochs.title: Ushe Hwakabatana
epochs.one: Mwari anovimbisa Dhavhidhi, “Chigaro chako choushe chichagara nokusingaperi.”
epochs.events: Mambo wokutanga Sauro, Dhavhidhi naGoriati, sungano yaDhavhidhi, Soromoni anovaka temberi
epochs.q: Imba yako noushe hwako zvichasimbiswa pamberi pako nokusingaperi, nechigaro chako choushe chichasimbiswa nokusingaperi.
epochs.christ: “Chigaro choushe chisingaperi” chinozadziswa muna Jesu, mwanakomana waDhavhidhi — ndicho chikonzero anonzi “Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi” (Ruka 1:32-33; Mateo 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Nguva yepamusoro yeIsiraeri, ichitongwa namadzimambo matatu.

  • Sauro · mambo wakakumbirwa nevanhu; kutanga kwakanaka kwakaparadzwa nokusateerera.
  • Dhavhidhi · “munhu anoda mwoyo waMwari.” Anokunda Goriati, anoita Jerusarema guta guru. Anoita chivi chikuru (Bhatishebha) asi anotendeuka nomwoyo (Pisarema 51).
  • Sungano yaDhavhidhi (2 Samueri 7) · Mwari anovimbisa kusimbisa imba yaDhavhidhi nokusingaperi — mudzi unokosha wetariro yaMesiya.
  • Soromoni · pakati pouchenjeri noupfumi anovaka temberi, asi pakupera kwoupenyu hwake anotsaukira kuzvifananidzo.
epochs.next: Pashure paSoromoni, ushe hunopatsanurwa kuva huviri…

epochs.title: Ushe Hwakapatsanurwa
epochs.one: Hwakapatsanurwa kuva chamhembe (Judha) nechokumusoro (Isiraeri), rudzi rwopinda muna kuparara.
epochs.people: Madzimambo oushe huviri; vaporofita vakaita saEria, Isaya, Jeremia
epochs.events: Ushe hunopatsanurwa, kunamata zvifananidzo kunopararira, vaporofita vanoyambira
epochs.q: Saizvozvo vaIsiraeri vakamukira imba yaDhavhidhi kusvikira zuva ranhasi.
epochs.christ: Munguva ino vaporofita vanoprofita Mesiya anouya zvakajeka kupfuura (Isaya 9:6; Isaya 53).
epochs.detail:
Mumazuva omwanakomana waSoromoni rudzi runopatsanurwa: ushe hwokuchamhembe hweIsiraeri (marudzi 10, guta guru Samaria) neushe hwechamhembe hweJudha (marudzi 2, guta guru Jerusarema).

  • Isiraeri (kumusoro) · mambo wose anoshumira zvifananidzo; runowira kuAsiria muna 722 BC.
  • Judha (chamhembe) · rudzi rwaDhavhidhi runopfuurira, nemadzimambo mashoma akanaka akaita saHezekia naJosia, asi pakuwanda runoderera.
  • Vaporofita · Eria, Amosi, Isaya, Jeremia vanochema kuti “dzokai!” Uprofita hwaMesiya hunosvika papamusoro pacho pano (“muranda anotambudzika” weIsaya 53).
epochs.next: Pakupedzisira kutongwa kwakayambirwa kunouya — vanotapwa kuenda kuutapwa…

epochs.title: Utapwa
epochs.one: Rudzi runoparara uye vanhu vanozvuzvurudzirwa kunyika dzokumwe.
epochs.events: Isiraeri inowira kuAsiria (722), Judha inowira kuBhabhironi uye temberi inoparadzwa (586)
epochs.q: Panzizi dzeBhabhironi, Ndipo patakagara pasi, zvirokwazvo tikachema, Pakurangarira kwedu Zioni.
epochs.christ: Mukati mokupera tariro Jeremia anovimbisa “sungano itsva” (Jeremia 31:31) — sungano iyo Jesu yaakaisa paChirairo Chokupedzisira.
epochs.detail:
Yambiro dzinoitika. Temberi inopiswa uye vanhu vanotapwa kuenda kuBhabhironi — vachirasikirwa nenyika, mambo, netemberi: nzvimbo yakaderera pane dzose.

  • Kuwa kuviri · Isiraeri (Asiria, 722 BC) naJudha (Bhabhironi, 586 BC).
  • Dhanieri · muenzaniso wokutenda kunyange muruvazhe rwavahedheni (gomba reshumba); anoona zviratidzo zve“ushe husingaperi” huchauya.
  • Pwititi yetariro · chiratidzo chaEzekieri chamapfupa akaoma anorarama (Ezekieri 37) ne“sungano itsva” yaJeremia zvinonongedzera kuremangwana murima.
epochs.next: Makore makumi manomwe gare gare, Mwari anovhura nzira — vanodzokera kumusha…

epochs.title: Kudzoka kuUtapwa
epochs.events: Kudzoka nechirevo chaKoreshi, kuvakazve temberi, kuvakazve masvingo eJerusarema, kudzoreredzwa kweShoko
epochs.christ: Maraki, bhuku rokupedzisira reTestamende Yekare, rinoguma richiprofita nhume yokugadzirira nzira yaMesiya: “Ndinotuma nhume yangu” (Maraki 3:1).
epochs.detail:
Nechirevo chamambo wePersia Koreshi (538 BC) kudzoka kunotanga. Mumapoka matatu vanodzoka vovakazve zvakanga zvaparadzwa.

  • Zerubhabheri · anovakazve temberi (yakapera 516 BC).
  • Ezira · anodzidzisazve Shoko uye anomutsidzira kutenda.
  • Nehemia · anovakazve masvingo eJerusarema mumazuva 52.
  • Esteri · anoponesa vaJudha vaiva muPersia pakuparadzwa — “nokuda kwenguva yakadai.”
  • Kuchine kushuva · temberi yamira, asi hapana mambo akafanana naDhavhidhi. Vanhu vanomirira Mesiya.
epochs.next: Uye zvino… sokunge denga ranyarara, makore mazana mana anopfuura.

epochs.title: Makore Okunyarara
epochs.one: Makore mazana mana pasina inzwi romuporofita — asi chikuva chakanga chichigadzirwa muchinyararire.
epochs.events: Persia → Girisi → kuzvitonga kwevaMakabhe → kutonga kweRoma
epochs.q: Zvino nguva yakati yazara kwazvo, Mwari akatuma Mwanakomana wake, akaberekwa nomukadzi.
epochs.christ: “Kugadzira chikuva” uku kwose kwaiva Mwari achishanda kuti Jesu auye chaizvo “panguva yakazara kwazvo.”
epochs.detail:
Kubva kuna Maraki kusvika kuTestamende Itsva, makore anenge mazana mana anopfuura pasina Rugwaro rutsva. Asi seri kwenhoroondo Mwari aigadzira nzira yevhangeri.

  • Umambo hunochinjana · Persia → Girisi (Arekizandere, 333 BC) → vaPtolemy navaSeleucid → kupanduka kwevaMakabhe (167 BC) → Roma (63 BC).
  • ChiGiriki · kukunda kwaArekizandere kunoita kuti chiGiriki chive mutauro wose; Testamende Yekare inoshandurirwa muchiGiriki (Septuagint), kuvhura nzira yokuti vhangeri ripararire nokukurumidza.
  • Migwagwa norugare rweRoma · migwagwa yakavakwa zvakanaka ne“Pax Romana” zvinova migwagwa yeushumiri.
  • Masinagoge namapoka · kudzidzisa musinagoge kunodzika midzi; vaFarisi navaSadhusi vanomuka; uye kushuva Mesiya kunoibva.

epochs.title: Jesu Anouya
epochs.people: Jesu, vadzidzi gumi navaviri, Johani Mubhabhatidzi
epochs.events: Kuva munhu, ushumiri hwake nokudzidzisa nezvishamiso, rufu pamuchinjikwa, kumuka nezuva retatu
epochs.q: Izwi rakazova munhu, rikagara pakati pedu… azere nenyasha nechokwadi.
epochs.christ: Rudzi rwomukadzi (chiitiko 2), kuropafadzwa kwaAbhurahamu (3), gwayana rePasika (4), mambo asingaperi waDhavhidhi (6), sungano itsva (8) — zvose zvinozadziswa mumunhu mumwe, Jesu: muporofita, mupristi, namambo wedu wechokwadi.
epochs.detail:
Kunyarara kunotyoka; Akavimbiswa anosvika. Mavhangeri mana anopupura upenyu hwaJesu, rufu, nokumuka kubva kumativi mana.

  • Kuva munhu · Mwari anova munhu (Emanueri, “Mwari anesu”), munzvimbo yakaderera yeBhetirehema.
  • Ushumiri · anodzidzisa ushe hwaMwari, anoporesa varwere, anodana vatadzi. “Akandiona ini, akaona Baba.”
  • Muchinjikwa · anoripa munzvimbo yedu mutengo wechivi norufu zvakaunzwa nokuwa (chiitiko 2). Gwayana rePasika rechokwadi.
  • Kumuka · achimuka nezuva retatu, anotyora simba rechivi, rufu, naSatani — kare pamuchinjikwa “akaparadza vabati namasimba… akavakunda mauri” (VaKorose 2:15).

Saka Jesu ndiye muporofita wedu wechokwadi (anoratidza nzira inoenda kuna Mwari), mupristi wedu wechokwadi (anoyananisira chivi nomuviri wake), namambo wedu wechokwadi (anokunda chivi, rufu, naSatani uye anotonga nokusingaperi).
epochs.next: Jesu akamuka anotuma vadzidzi vake munyika…

epochs.title: Kereke Inotanga
epochs.one: Mweya anouya, uye vhangeri rinopararira kusvika kumigumo yenyika.
epochs.events: Mweya anodururwa paPendekosti, kereke inoberekwa, vhangeri rinopararira kubva Jerusarema kusvika Roma kuburikidza nokutambudzwa
epochs.q: Asi muchapiwa simba, kana Mweya Mutsvene auya pamusoro penyu… kusvikira kumugumo wenyika.
epochs.christ: Nyaya iyi ichiri kufamba nanhasi. Bhaibheri rinoguma richivimbisa kuti Jesu achadzoka uye achaita zvinhu zvose zvitsva (Zvakazarurwa 21).
epochs.detail:
Pashure pokukwira kwaJesu kudenga, Mweya akavimbiswa anouya paPendekosti uye kereke inoberekwa. Vhangeri rinopararira nokushamisa.

  • Pendekosti · Mweya anoshandura vadzidzi vaitya kuva zvapupu zvakashinga.
  • Petro · anoparidza vhangeri kuvaJudha muJerusarema.
  • Pauro · kubva pamushori kuva muapositori, achisima kereke munyika yavahedheni uye achinyora tsamba.
  • Kusvika kumigumo yenyika · Jerusarema → Judhea → Samaria → Roma. Chivimbiso chakapiwa Abhurahamu cha“marudzi ose” chinova chokwadi.
  • Nesu · nyaya haigumi; inopfuurira ichienda kukudzoka kwaJesu nedenga idzva nenyika itsva.

epochs.title: Kudzoreredzwa
epochs.one: Jesu anodzoka uye anoita zvinhu zvose zvitsva.
epochs.events: Kudzoka kwechipiri, kutongwa kwokupedzisira, kuguma kwechivi·rufu·misodzi, denga idzva nenyika itsva
epochs.q: Achapisika misodzi yose pameso avo; rufu haruchavipo, kana kuchema, kana kurira, kana kutambudzika hazvingavipo.
epochs.christ: Edheni rokusika kwokutanga rinodzoreredzwa pakupedzisira se“Jerusarema Idzva.” Mwari anogara navanhu vake nokusingaperi — kuzara kwaEmanueri (Zvakazarurwa 21:3; Mateo 1:23).
epochs.detail:
Bhaibheri harigumiri munguva yekereke. Bhuku raro rokupedzisira, Zvakazarurwa, rinoratidza Jesu achidzoka kuti apedzise zvose.

  • Kudzoka kwechipiri · mambo akavimbiswa anodzoka mukubwinya.
  • Kukunda kwokupedzisira · Satani norufu zvinoparadzwa nokusingaperi, uye Kristu anotonga saMambo wamadzimambo (1 VaKorinte 15:25-26; Zvakazarurwa 20:10).
  • Kutongwa nokumuka · zvakaipa zvose zvinoruramiswa, uye vakafa vanomutswa.
  • Denga idzva nenyika itsva · chivi, rufu, misodzi, nokutambudzika zvinopera nokusingaperi (Zvakazarurwa 21:4).
  • Edheni rakadzoreredzwa · mu“Jerusarema Idzva” rakanaka kupfuura kutanga, Mwari anogara navanhu vake nokusingaperi — kwakananga Bhaibheri rose.

Saka iko zvino inguva ye“zvatova, asi zvisati zvasvika”: muna Jesu ruponeso rwatova rwakaitwa, asi kuzara kwarwo kuchiri kumirirwa.
epochs.next: Saka nyaya iyi yose inorevei kwandiri “ini”?

love: Nyaya inotanga kwete nokutongwa asi nokusika kwakadururwa norudo.
Panguva yakangotadza vanhu, Mwari akavimbisa kununurwa ipapo pakarepo.
Mwari akatanga kuuya kumurume asina kufanira, akamudana nezita rake, akamuita nzira yokuropafadza nayo.
Akanzwa kugomera kwavanhu vaiva varanda akaburuka iye pachake kuzovanunura.
Vachimupandukira kakawanda, asi nguva imwe neimwe pavaichema aitumira munununuri achivamutsa.
Haana kurasa kunyange Dhavhidhi akawa, uye kuburikidza naye akavimbisa Mambo asingaperi.
Kuvanhu vakamufuratira, akaramba achitumira vaporofita, achikumbira achiti, “Ndapota dzokai kumusha.”
Akaenda navo kunyange kunyika yakasviba pane dzose youtapwa, akavimbisa kudzoreredzwa.
Kunyange kuvanhu vakatadza kakawanda, haana kudzosa chivimbiso chake.
Kunyange mumakore mazana mana okunyarara, asingaonekwi, aigadzira nzira yoruponeso.
Tichiri vatadzi, akatuma Mwanakomana wake kuti arase upenyu hwake.
Rudo rwatakagamuchira, iye zvino anorutumira kuti ruyerere kunyika yose.
Pakupedzisira achapisika misodzi yose uye achavandudza zvinhu zvose norudo.

mis.w: “Sei Mwari akaita vanhu vaigona kutadza? Hazvaisava nani kusatisika zvachose here?”
mis.t: Mwari akasika nyika navanhu kwete nokushaya chinhu, asi norudo rwakawandisa. Kuita vanhu sevanhu vanowirirana naMwari ndirwo rudo pacharwo. Uye kunyange kupinda kwechivi hakuna kuva kunze kwehurongwa hworuponeso hwaMwari (VaEfeso 1:4-5). Chiitiko chokutanga cheBhaibheri hachisi kutongwa asi rudo.

mis.w: “Kudzingwa nokupiwa rufu nokuda kwokudya muchero mumwe chete — ko Mwari haana hasha dzakapfuuridza here?”
mis.t: Kudzingwa muEdheni kwaiva kutongwa uye nyasha pamwe chete. Kudya pamuti woupenyu uye kurarama nokusingaperi muchimiro icho chakatyoka, chakaparadzaniswa naMwari, kwaizova kuvharirwa mukutambudzika nokusingaperi (Genesi 3:22). Kutendera rufu kwakavhura nzira yokudzoka, uye ipapo pakarepo Mwari akavimbisa Munununuri (Genesi 3:15). Rudo rwakanga rwatova mukati mokutongwa.

mis.w: “Abhurahamu akasarudzwa nokuti aiva nokutenda kukuru — ko vanhu vose veBhaibheri havasi mhare dzetsika here?”
mis.t: Abhurahamu akareva nhema uye akakahadzika; Jakobho aiva munyengeri. Mwari haana kudana vanhu “vakafanira” asi vakanga vane zvikanganiso, nenyasha. Chikonzero chakanga chisiri kunaka kwavo asi rudo rwakatendeka rwaMwari (Dheuteronomio 7:7-8).

mis.w: “Ko murayiro (Mirairo) haasi bvunzo yaunofanira kupasa kuti uponeswe here?”
mis.t: Mwari akavanunura asati avapa murayiro. Kunyange Mirairo Gumi inotanga nokuzivisa kworuponeso: “Ndini Jehovha, Mwari wako, akakubvisa munyika yeIjipiti” (Eksodho 20:2). Murayiro hausi “uchengete kuti uponeswe,” asi nhungamiro yorudo yokuti vanhu vakatonunurwa vararame sei (Dheuteronomio 7:7-9). Nyasha dzinogara dziri pakutanga; kuteerera ndiwo mhinduro.

mis.w: “Kukunda kweKenani kwaiva kuuraya kusina tsitsi — saka Mwari weTestamende Yekare ane utsinye chaihwo.”
mis.t: Iyi inhau yakaoma isingapedzwi nomutsara mumwe. Asi Bhaibheri harizviratidzi sechisimba chisina musoro asi sokutongwa pashure pamazana amakore okushivirira pamberi pezvakaipa zvakanyanya (kusanganisira kubayira vana) (Genesi 15:16; Dheuteronomio 9:4-5; Revhitiko 18:24-25). Mwari anononoka kunyange kutonga, uye anogamuchira nomufaro avo vanotendeukira kwaari — kunyange vatorwa saRakabhi naRute (Joshua 6:25; Rute 4:13-17).

mis.w: “Dhavhidhi aiva mhare isina chikanganiso — ndicho chikonzero akanzi ‘munhu anoda mwoyo waMwari.’”
mis.t: Dhavhidhi akaita upombwe uye kunyange umhondi. “Munhu anoda mwoyo waMwari” hazvirevi asina chikanganiso, asi uyo asina kuvanza chivi chake — akatendeuka zvizere achiramba achidzokera kuna Mwari (Pisarema 51). Rudo rwaMwari harurasi kunyange avo vanowa zvakaipisisa.

mis.w: “Muporofita ihwenga anofanotaura ramangwana / Mwari weTestamende Yekare ihasha chete.”
mis.t: Mwoyo womuporofita hausi “kufanotaura ramangwana” asi chikumbiro chinorwadza chaMwari: “Ndapota dzokai.” Kunyange yambiro yokutongwa haisi yokuparadza asi yokutendeudza vanhu nokuvaponesa — “handifariri rufu rwowakaipa” (Ezekieri 33:11).

mis.w: “Utapwa hunoratidza kuti Mwari akarasa Isiraeri zvachose.”
mis.t: Utapwa hahusi kurasa asi kuranga nokuchenesa kwababa kumwana anodikanwa (VaHebheru 12:6). Mwari haana kuenda; akanga ari naDhanieri pakati poutapwa uye akavimbisa, “ndinoziva ndangariro dzandinorangarira pamusoro penyu… ndangariro dzorugare… kuti ndikupei mugumo une tariro” (Jeremia 29:11).

mis.w: “Pasina shoko kwamakore mazana mana, Mwari akanga aenda kana kuti aizorora.”
mis.t: Kunyarara hakusi kushayikwa. Akangosataura, asi nguva yose iyoyo achifambisa umambo, mitauro, nemigwagwa kuti agadzire chikuva choruponeso. Munguva yakanyarara zvikuru, Mwari aishanda zvakanyanya, norudo (VaGaratiya 4:4).

mis.w: “Jesu aingova mumwe mudzidzisi wetsika akanaka / muchinjikwa waiva kukundwa kunorwadza.”
mis.t: Jesu akati ndiye Mwari pachake (Johani 8:58), uye muchinjikwa wakanga usiri tsaona kana kukundwa asi rudo rwakarongwa. Haana kukweverwa ikoko nechisimba; akarasa upenyu hwake pachake (Johani 10:18). “Hakuna munhu ano rudo rukuru kune urwu, kuti munhu arasire hama dzake upenyu hwake” (Johani 15:13).

mis.w: “Kereke iboka ravanhu vakakwana, kana kuti chivako chete.”
mis.t: Kereke haisi ungano ya“vatsvene vakapedza” asi yavatadzi vakakanganwirwa. Kunyange muapositori Pauro akazviti “mukuru” wavatadzi (1 Timoti 1:15). Kereke yokutanga yakakakavadzanawo uye yakagumburwa (Mabasa 6:1; 1 VaKorinte 1:11). Hairi nzvimbo yokuzvikudza, asi vanhu vanopfuudza rudo rwavakagamuchira (Johani 13:34-35).

core.title: Chivi chokutanga — hakuna akarurama
core.body: Dambudziko harisi “mabasa mashoma akaipa” asi mudzi womwoyo. Kubva pana Adhamu, munhu wose anoberekwa ari pasi pechivi uye haagoni kusvika kuna Mwari ari oga.
core.vtext: Hakuna akarurama, kunyange nomumwe… nokuti vose vakatadza, vakasasvika pakubwinya kwaMwari.

core.title: Murayiro haungandiponesi
core.body: Murayiro hausi danho asi chionioni. Pose paunoedza zvakanyanya, ndipo paunoratidza kuti unotadza zvakadii. Chinangwa chawo kutiendesa kuna Kristu.
core.vtext: zvivi zvinoziviswa nomurayiro… murayiro wakanga uri muperekedzi wedu, kutiisa kuna Kristu.

core.title: Nenyasha — chipo, kwete kushanda
core.body: Ruponeso harusi mubhadharo wezvinhu zvakanaka zvawakaita, asi chipo chemahara kune vasina kufanira. Saka hapana munhu angazvikudza.
core.vtext: makaponeswa nenyasha, nokutenda… hazvibvi pamabasa, kuti kurege kuva nomunhu anozvikudza.

core.title: Kururamiswa nokutenda
core.body: Kwete nokuchengeta murayiro, asi nokutenda muna Jesu Kristu unonzi wakarurama — wakapfekedzwa kwete kururama kwako asi kururama kwake.
core.vtext: zvatinoruramiswa nokutenda ngative norugare kuna Mwari… munhu haaruramiswi namabasa omurayiro, asi nokutenda kuna Kristu Jesu.

core.title: Bhaibheri rinonongedzera kuna Jesu
core.body: Bhaibheri harisi bhuku ravarume vakuru kana rokuzvibatsira. Kubva Genesi kusvika Zvakazarurwa, peji rimwe nerimwe rinopupura munhu mumwe — Jesu Kristu.
core.vtext: ndiwo anondipupurira ini… akavadudzira zvakanyorwa pamusoro pake muMagwaro ose.

core.title: Ushe hwaMwari — shoko guru raJesu
core.body: Iyi inyaya yakanyanya kudzidziswa naJesu. Kutonga kwaMwari saMambo kwakapinda munyika ino naJesu uye kuchapedziswa paanodzoka. Nomuchinjikwa nokumuka kwake, Jesu ndiye Mambo wechokwadi akakunda chivi, rufu, naSatani.
core.vtext: Nguva yazadziswa, ushe hwaMwari hwaswedera pedyo; tendeukai, mutende Vhangeri.

core.title: Vhangeri — akapedza zvose
core.body: Chikwereti chechivi chandakanga ndisingagoni kuripa, Jesu akachiripa munzvimbo yangu pamuchinjikwa, uye nokumuka akakunda rufu. Handizendamiri pa“ita izvi” asi pa“zvapera.”
